# Python Demo API

Python Demo API is a compact FastAPI reference app with a realistic Books API and supporting documentation for authentication and multi-cloud deployment.

Preferred ingestion order:
1. /openapi.json
2. /docs-index.json
3. /sitemap.xml
4. Source markdown under website/docs/

Primary machine-readable artifacts:
- OpenAPI contract: https://jaredthivener.github.io/python-demo/openapi.json
- Curated docs manifest: https://jaredthivener.github.io/python-demo/docs-index.json
- Sitemap: https://jaredthivener.github.io/python-demo/sitemap.xml

Primary human-readable docs:
- Introduction: https://jaredthivener.github.io/python-demo/docs/intro
- Getting Started: https://jaredthivener.github.io/python-demo/docs/getting-started
- Books API Reference: https://jaredthivener.github.io/python-demo/docs/api/books
- Auth Overview — The Big Picture: https://jaredthivener.github.io/python-demo/docs/auth/overview
- Deployment Overview: https://jaredthivener.github.io/python-demo/docs/deployment

Notes for tool builders:
- Treat the OpenAPI contract as the source of truth for executable API tools.
- Treat docs-index.json as the curated map of canonical topics and URLs.
- Use sitemap.xml for discovery, not for ranking authority.
- Prefer raw markdown from the repository over scraping built HTML when deeper ingestion is possible.
- The live demo app covers the Books API and observability endpoints; broader auth and cloud patterns live in the docs.
